summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, Delhi, Gujarat, and Telangana across Colo, Build, and General layers. The top India policy hook is the Notice of Attachment of bank account notices (AP No. 15504-15509 of 2026) under regulation. Value-chain layers moving on India include Colo (Sify, AdaniConneX), Build (NTT India), and General (Nxtra Data, CtrlS, Yotta). Top movers this run: Sify (score 77.5, Δ0.0, new≤7d=1), NTT India (score 35.4, Δ0.0, new≤7d=1), AdaniConneX (score 30.6, Δ0.0, new≤7d=1).
